blockedItems: Mobile real-device runtime smoke remains blocked until an SDK 57-compatible Expo Go/TestFlight path or EAS development build path is available.
Vercel build-rate-limit affected PR #43; Phase 10 was merged with accepted infrastructure quota risk after local/static validation passed.
nextRecommendedAction: Bundle future memory updates into each completed sprint closure when technically possible, then continue mobile premium visual refinement or resume SDK 57 mobile runtime gate.
